title: hedyotis × gracilenta
intro: Hedyotis × gracilenta, also known as Hongjingtian or Goldthread, is a rare and endangered plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hedyotis × gracilenta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
